description: Create a custom Life Cycle Impact Assessment (LCIA) method in OpenLCA named 'Corporate Eco-Strategy 2025' featuring two impact categories: 'Climate Priority' (Unit: kg CO2 eq, linked to 'Carbon dioxide' emission to air with factor 1.0) and 'Acidification Watch' (Unit: kg SO2 eq, linked to 'Sulfur dioxide' emission to air with factor 1.0). The method must include a normalization set named 'Reference Baseline 2020' (Climate Priority: 10000.0, Acidification Watch: 50.0) and a weighting set named 'Strategic Weights' (Climate Priority: 0.8, Acidification Watch: 0.2). Export the single score results for the 'Transport, combination truck, diesel powered' process using this method, with normalization and weighting applied, to ~/LCA_Results/single_score_results.csv.
